creator: alex@nixd.org
text:
Created attachment 254955
sysutils/rdevd port files

A devd(8) re-implementation on the Rust programming language as part of the R4FBSDk project at https://4neko.org/Rust4FreeBSDkm/index.html

Rdevd copies the behavior of devd(8) and it is fully compatible with the devd(8) with some exceptions in runtime flags.

Project page: https://www.4neko.org/rdevd/index.html
Public Issues tracker: https://gitlab.com/4neko/rdevd
Public Repository: https://repo.4neko.org/4neko/rdevd
